title: One-of-Each Frame Solution
description: A one-of-each solution for the 13 Tile Frame. This is one of 1500 solutions.

title: Large Frame Design
description: A completed Large Frame arrangement using hexagonal bubble tiles.

title: Small Flower with Triangular Tiles
description: A Small flower frame layout filled with triangular bubble tiles.

title: All 14 Hex Bubble Tiles
description: An infinite lattice using all 14 hexagonal bubble tile types with no support tiles.

title: All Six Square Bubble Tiles
description: An infinite lattice using all six square bubble tile types.

title: All Four Triangular Tile
description: A tiling example using all four triangular puzzle tile types.

title: All Ten Rhombic Bubble Tiles
description: An infinite lattice using a ten-tile arrangement from the complete rhombic bubble family.

title: Octagon Star
description: An eight-point star construction combining the regular 8/2 star with 45-degree rhombs.

title: Tangrams
description: A classic seven-piece tangram set using squares, 45-45-90 triangles, and a tangram parallelogram.

title: Mixed Bubble Tiling H4B/T1
description: A tiling example combining H4B with triangular T1 bubble tiles.

title: Square Puzzle Tiling S0/S1
description: A three-tile periodic lattice using yellow and purple square bubble tiles with the Puzzle edge style.

title: Hex Puzzle Spiral H1/H5
description: A large spiral patch built from hexagonal puzzle tiles H1 and H5.

title: Spectre Cluster
description: A starter cluster made with Spectre monotiles.

title: Hex Bubble Tiling H0/H4C
description: A four-tile tiling seed using one H0 tile and three H4C tiles.

title: Hex Bubble Tiling H1/H5
description: A two-tile tiling seed using the dual pair H1 and H5.

title: Regular Polygon Tiling
description: A colored tiling made from regular triangles, squares, and hexagons.

title: Soft Tile Tiling SF1/SF3B
description: A tiling example using soft tiles SF1 and SF3B.

title: Soft Tile Tiling SF0/SF3C
description: A periodic tiling using one SF0 and two SF3C soft tiles.

title: Cloud Soft Tile Tiling SF2B
description: A single soft SF2B tile with a cloud texture repeated by tiling fill.

title: Pac-Man Octagon Tiling
description: A large tiling patch using the Pac-Man Octagon 1 shape.

title: Rhombic Bubble Tiling
description: A four-tile tiling seed using rhombic bubble tiles RB1, RB2A/RB2B, and RB3A.

title: Pac-Man Pentagon Tiling
description: A large tiling built from Pac-Man Pentagon tiles.

title: Puzzle Squiggle Octagon Tiling
description: A three-tile tiling seed using puzzle-styled Squiggle Octagon bubble tiles.

title: Arc Squiggle Octagon Tiling
description: A three-tile Squiggle Octagon tiling seed using the 60° arc Bubble Style.

title: Square Tooth Trapezoid Tiling
description: A two-tile five-sided trapezoid tiling seed using the Square Tooth Bubble Style.

title: Spike Style Tiling H3C/H3A
description: A tiling example using the compact Spike Bubble Style on H3C/H3A triangular bubble tiles.

title: Heesch Number 1
description: A Heesch-number-one example layout using soft, hexagonal bubble, and five-sided trapezoid-based tiles.

title: Infinite Soft Tiling
description: A large soft-tile periodic lattice using a virtual lattice fill.

title: Square Tooth Dodecagon Tiling
description: A six-tile lattice using a dodecagon seed with hexagonal and square bubble tiles in the Square Tooth edge style.

title: Cookie and Oreo Tiling H4B/H1
description: A cookie-and-oreo image-fill lattice using hexagonal bubble tiles.

title: Donut Trio Tiling H2B/H4A/3A
description: A three-donut image-fill lattice using hexagonal bubble tiles.

title: Hexagonal Tiling H2C/H3B/H4B
description: A twelve-tile periodic design using H2C, H3B, and H4B hexagonal bubble tiles.

title: Bubble Trio Tiling H0/H6/H3C
description: A three-tile periodic design using H0, H3C, and H6 hexagonal bubble tiles.

title: Beautiful Penrose Flower
description: A large flower construction made from bubble-converted thin Penrose rhombs.

title: Cloud Dodecagon, Hexagon, and Squares
description: A cloud-image lattice combining a twelve-sided bubble tile, a hexagonal bubble tile, and square bubble tiles.

title: R1 and H4B
description: A periodic balance-equation solution combining Rhombic R1 and Hexagonal H4B bubble tiles.
